SEARCH
Module storm.core
Package st.orm.core.spi

Interface ConnectionProvider

All Superinterfaces:
Orderable<Provider>, Provider
All Known Implementing Classes:
DefaultConnectionProviderImpl, TransactionAwareConnectionProviderImpl
public interface ConnectionProvider extends Provider
The connection provider is responsible for providing connections to the database.
Since:
1.5

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface st.orm.core.spi.Orderable

    Orderable.After, Orderable.AfterAny, Orderable.Before, Orderable.BeforeAny

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Connection
    getConnection(DataSource dataSource, TransactionContext context)
    Gets a connection from the given data source.
    void
    releaseConnection(Connection connection, DataSource dataSource, TransactionContext context)
    Releases the given connection back to the data source.

    Methods inherited from interface st.orm.core.spi.Provider

    isEnabled

  • Method Details

    • getConnection

      Connection getConnection(@Nonnull DataSource dataSource, @Nullable TransactionContext context)
      Gets a connection from the given data source.
      Parameters:
      dataSource - the data source to get the connection from.
      context - the transaction context.
      Returns:
      a connection to the database.

    • releaseConnection

      void releaseConnection(@Nonnull Connection connection, @Nonnull DataSource dataSource, @Nullable TransactionContext context)
      Releases the given connection back to the data source.
      Parameters:
      connection - the connection to release.
      dataSource - the data source to which the connection belongs.
      context - the transaction context.
